## [00:00 - 01:05]

You said you would tell the old Vin that you want to be a more balanced person. Well, here's the thing, right? But don't you think that where you are in life right now is also because of the obsession? I still would be obsessive. I think it's a double-edged sword for me. However, I would say Vin, go camping on the Saturday, man. Take your wife and your son out. And then the other five days, I probably will... I'm still quite obsessive. Would you say you're more absolutely clear on what you really want now? I'm still confused as F. Yeah. There are moments in my life where I'm like, I got this. Wake up next day. Who am I? So I'm the same as all of you. I don't think... I think a lot of the times people have the wrong assumption. And I know you've found me through social media. Just because maybe on social media I've got a lot of followers, I don't have my work out. So every year I recalibrate myself. I find that every year I have to sit down and go, who are you? What are your values? And are the goals you're chasing still aligned with the values that you currently have? Which values are bullshit? Which values are real? Which values do you want to have because of mum and dad? Which values do you truly have?
